forgot-password.title: Enter your registered email
forgot-password.text: If you are registered on the platform, we will send a link to your registered email so you can recover your account.

success.title: Order sent
success.text: If the email address provided is registered on the platform, you will receive a link to recover your password.

alter-password.title: New password
alter-password.text: Create a new password to access the platform.
